reviews.comment:
No aceptan tarjetasy esto es grave en un lugar alejado. Nunca hay señal de celular. El lugar de compras es lindo y tiene comida fresca.

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept cards, which is a big problem in a remote location. There's never any cell phone signal. The shopping area is nice and has fresh food.
